product_surfaces: production service WriteExecutor path for create-issue dry-run and live execution
production service WriteExecutor idempotency/audit/cache replay path
production service WriteExecutor typed provider, credential, partial audit, and partial cache error paths
production CLI write command validation path for update-issue, add-comment, create-page, and update-page
freshness: current source/build/runtime evidence required; run.sh copies the repository to a temporary workspace, injects offline validation tests only in the temporary copy, and runs targeted Go tests against production packages
mocks_used: External GitCode provider behavior is stubbed only at the gitcode.Client seam; the production CLI parser, service WriteExecutor, SQLite cache, audit trail, and cache refresh paths are exercised.
